channel.title: Antebellum on Berrytree.org
channel.description: Recent content in Antebellum on Berrytree.org

item.title: Franklin Pierce Berry
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Franklin Pierce Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Joshua Berry × Nancy Ellison — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 4Lewis Berry × Sally Toler — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 5Ira Berry × Nancy Wynn — NC and Kentucky
Gen 6Franklin Pierce Berry × Sophia Sellers — Kentucky → Illinois

Generation 6 Franklin Pierce Berry

Born
July 12, 1854, Uniontown, Kentucky
Died
January 1, 1909, Williamson County, Illinois
Married
Sophia M. Sellers (married February 6, 1878, died 1912)
Parents
Ira Berry and Nancy Wynn Berry, Kentucky
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of Franklin Pierce Berry#

Franklin Pierce Berry was born on July 12th, 1854 in Uniontown Kentucky and died on January 1st, 1909 in Williamson Co., Illinois. On February 6th, 1878 Franklin P. Berry married Sophia M. Sellers in Evansville, Indiana. Sophie was the daughter of Orman Sellers and Louisa Ashby. She was born on April 6th, 1860 in Anton, Kentucky, and died in 1912.

item.title: Henry Bradford Berry
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Henry Bradford Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Robert Berry Jr. × Mary Waggoner — NC and Fayette County, Alabama
Gen 4Thompson Berry × Rosanah Gutman — Fayette County, Alabama
Gen 5Henry Bradford Berry × Malissa Jane Jeffries — Fayette County, Alabama

Generation 5 Henry Bradford Berry

Born
December 6, 1829, Fayette County, Alabama
Died
April 22, 1895, Fayette County, Alabama
Married
Malissa Jane Jeffries (married June 4, 1874, died October 6, 1921)
Parents
Thompson Berry and Rosanah Gutman Berry, Fayette County, Alabama
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of Henry Bradford Berry#

Henry Bradford Berry was born Dec 6, 1829 in Fayette County, Alabama. He married Malissa Jane Jeffries on June 4, 1874. Malissa was born Nov 6, 1851 and died on October 6, 1921. Her headstone is pictured on the right. Henry Bradford Berry’s headstone is on the left. Henry Bradford died on Apr 22, 1895. Henry and Malissa, along with his parents, Thompson and Rosanah were buried in Pleasant Hill Methodist Church Cemetery in Fayette County, Alabama.

item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors

Gen 5Isaac Berry × Amanda Josephine Blackwood — Wayne County, Tennessee

Generation 5 Isaac Berry

Born
August 26, 1837, Wayne County, Tennessee
Died
After 1910, Wayne County, Tennessee
Married
Amanda Josephine Blackwood (married 1864)
Parents
David Berry and Elizabeth Shipman Berry, Tennessee
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Book Chapter: Read more about Isaac Berry’s line in Chapter 9: Thomas Berry from Our Berrys in Frontier America

item.title: John Robert Berry
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. John Robert Berry
John Robert Berry

Generation 5 John Robert Berry

Born
September 25, 1842, Orange County, North Carolina
Died
October 10, 1917, Orange County, North Carolina
Married
Elizabeth Frances Bowling — married November 30, 1865
Parents
Thomas Person Berry and Sarah Lunsford, Orange County, NC
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline
Direct Berry Line
  1. Robert and Mary Williamson Berry — Princess Anne County, Virginia
  2. Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry — Orange County, North Carolina
  3. William Berry and Hannah Cate — Orange County, NC
  4. Thomas Person Berry and Sarah Lunsford — Orange County, NC
  5. John Robert Berry and Elizabeth Frances Bowling — Orange County, NC

Early Life#

John Robert Berry was born on September 25, 1842, in Orange County, North Carolina. He was the third son of Thomas Person and Sarah Lunsford Berry. There is not a lot known about the period between Thomas Person Berry and Sarah Lunsford’s marriage on September 28, 1831, and the birth of their first son in 1836.

item.title: Ira Berry (NC)
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Ira Berry (NC)
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Joshua Berry × Nancy Ellison — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 4Lewis Berry × Sally Toler — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 5Ira Berry × Nancy Wynn — Orange County, NC → Union County, KY

Generation 5 Ira Berry

Born
1833, Orange County, North Carolina
Died
c. 1864–1870 (probably killed in the Civil War)
Married
Nancy Wynn/Winn — married before 1856, probably in Tennessee or Kentucky
Parents
Lewis Berry and Sally (Sarah) Toler Berry, Orange County, NC
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of Ira Berry#

Ira Berry was born in 1833 in Orange County, North Carolina, the son of Lewis Berry and Sally (Sarah) Toler Berry. Lewis and Sally were married on October 13, 1829, in Orange County, NC.

item.title: Chapter 14: Thomas Person Berry 1808–1884
item.description:
Our Berrys in Frontier America by Benjamin Berry Henderson Sr.

← Chapter 12: Henry Berry | Table of Contents | Chapter 15: John Robert Berry →

Chapter 14#

Thomas Person Berry 1808–1884#

T.P. Berry marriage bond to Sarah Lunsford

item.title: Chapter 15: John Robert Berry 1842–1917
item.description:
Our Berrys in Frontier America by Benjamin Berry Henderson Sr.

← Chapter 14: Thomas Person Berry | Table of Contents | Chapter 16: Wiley P. Berry →

Chapter 15#

John Robert Berry 1842–1917#

John Robert Berry was born on September 25th, 1842, and was the third son of Thomas Person and Sarah Lunsford Berry. He is also my great-grandfather. He fought in the Civil War and was wounded in the battle of Cold Harbor. After the war, he returned to Orange County, North Carolina, and married Elizabeth Frances Bowling on November 30th, 1865.

item.title: John H. Berry ALA TX
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. John H. Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Robert Berry Jr. × Mary Waggoner — NC and Fayette County, Alabama

Generation 5 John H. Berry

Born
September 29, 1827, Fayette County, Alabama
Died
October 7, 1904, Burnet County, Texas
Married
Eliza Catherine Dennis — married July 1848, Fayette County, AL
Parents
David Middleton Berry and Didama Box Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Lineage#

  1. Gen 1 — Robert and Mary Williamson Berry — Princess Anne County, Virginia
  2. Gen 2 — Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry — Orange County, North Carolina
  3. Gen 3 — Robert Jr. and Mary Waggoner Berry — NC and Fayette County, Alabama
  4. Gen 4 — David Middleton and Didama Box Berry — Fayette County, Alabama
  5. Gen 5 — John H. and Catherine Dennis Berry — Alabama and Texas

John H. Berry born September 29, 1827, Fayette Co., AL, m. July 1848 in Fayette Co., AL, Eliza Catherine Dennis, b. January 21, 1828, AL (daughter of Benjamin Dennis and Elizabeth Berry), d. July 21, 1913, bur. Cauble Cemetery, Burnet Co., TX. John died October 7, 1904, Burnet Co., TX, bur. Cauble Cemetery.

item.title: Alexander Howard Berry Tx
item.description:
Alexander Howard Berry, son of John Berry and Mary Howell Berry#

Ancestors:#

  1. Generation Robert and Mary Williamson Berry
  2. Generation Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry
  3. Generation Robert Jr and Mary Camp Berry
  4. Generation George and Susan Berry
  5. Generation John and Mary Howell Berry

Alexander Howard Berry was born on August 24th 1854 in New Danville, Rusk County Texas.

item.title: Alfred Walter Berry Ala
item.description:
Alfred Walter Berry, Son of David Middleton and Didama Box Berry#

Ancestors:#

  1. Generation Robert and Mary Williamson Berry Princess Anne County, Virginia
  2. Generation Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry Orange County, North Carolina
  3. Generation Robert Jr. and Mary Waggoner Berry NC & Fayette County, Alabama
  4. Generation David Middleton and Didama Box Berry Fayette County, Alabama

Gen 5 Alfred Walter Berry was born December 14th, 1833 in Fayette County, Alabama and he died on August 24th, 1909. Alfred married Nancy Catherine Crowley about 1865. Nancy Crowley was born July 2nd, 1841 in Alabama and died April 10th, 1910 in Fayette County, Alabama.

item.title: Basil Manley Berry Ga
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Basil Manley Berry Ga
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3David J. Berry × Mary Blalock — Orange County, NC → Georgia
Gen 4Robert Berry × Elizabeth Everitt — Milton County, Georgia
Gen 5Basil Manley Berry × Mary Elizabeth Watson — Milton County, Georgia

Generation 5 Basil Manley Berry

Born
June 19, 1856, Milton County, Georgia
Died
October 1, 1914, Roswell, Fulton County, Georgia
Married
Mary Elizabeth Watson (married 1878; born June 24, 1855; died September 13, 1941)
Parents
Robert and Elizabeth Everitt Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of Basil Manley Berry#

Basil Manley Berry born June 19th, 1856 in Milton County, Georgia. In 1878 at the age of 20 he married Mary Elizabeth Watson born June 24, 1855, daughter of William L. Watson and Elizabeth A. ? Watson. Basil Manley Berry died Oct 1, 1914 in Roswell, Fulton County, Georgia and Mary Elizabeth Berry died Sept 13, 1941 in Roswell, Fulton County, Georgia. They are buried at Willeo Cemetery in Cobb County, Georgia.

item.title: Eli Berry NC
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Eli Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Joshua Berry × Nancy Ellison — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 4Eli Berry × Judy Betsy Taylor — Orange County, North Carolina

Generation 4 Eli Berry

Born
October 10, 1821, Orange County, North Carolina
Died
August 15, 1900, Cedar Grove, Orange County, North Carolina
Married
Judy Betsy Taylor (married December 21, 1846; born November 27, 1823; died July 31, 1900)
Parents
Joshua Berry and Nancy Ellison Berry, Orange County, NC
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Eli and Judy Betsy Taylor Berry#

Eli Berry was born in Orange County on October 10 1821 and died in Cedar Grove, Orange County NC, on August 15 1900. He married Judy Betsy Taylor who was born on November 27 1823 and died in Cedar Grove, Orange County NC, on July 31 1900. The couple Married on 21 Dec 1846.

item.title: Emanuel Patton Berry
item.description:
Ancestors:

  1. Generation Robert and Mary Williamson Berry, Princess Anne County, Virginia.
  2. Generation Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry, Orange County, North Carolina.
  3. Generation David J. and Mary Blalock Berry, Orange County, North Carolina, and Georgia
  4. Generation Robert and Elizabeth Everett Berry, Georgia.

GEN 5 Emanuel Patton and Clara Susan Worsham Berry

item.title: Family Homes
item.description:
Berry Family Homes & Historic Places

Houses, stores, and schools built or occupied by Berry family descendants, spanning the 1760s through the early 1900s.

These photographs preserve the homes and gathering places of the Berry family across multiple states and generations. Some of these structures still stand today; others survive only in these images. If you recognize a home or have additional photos, we’d love to hear from you.

item.title: Francis Marion Berry
item.description:
• Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
  • Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
  • Gen 3 Robert Berry Jr. × Mary Waggoner — North Carolina & Fayette County, Alabama
  • Gen 4 George Berry × Susanna Aldridge — North Carolina & Fayette County, Alabama
  • Gen 5 John Berry × Mary Howell — Fayette County, Alabama & Rusk County, Texas
  • Gen 6 Francis Marion Berry × Fannie Lillie Hudspeth John Berry was born in Person County North Carolina in 1815. his parents were George and Susan Aldridge. They were married after George Berry completed his tour of duty in the war of 1812 John Berry was about five years old when he left North Carolina with his father George, and mother Susanna Berry, his grandfather Robert Berry Jr.and his Grandmother Mary Waggoner Berry.

Congress made public lands available in Tuscaloosa Alabama on April 24 1820. Robert Berry Jr. listed in the 1810 Person County Census but it appears he and his family left North Carolina before the 1820 census was taken in Person County

item.title: George Rufus Berry NC
item.description:
George Rufus Berry (1829–1909)

Son of William Clarence Berry and Sally Bowles, from Orange County, NC, to Fayette County, Alabama, and Burnet County, Texas.

George Rufus Berry, son of William Clarence Berry and Sally Bowles Berry#

  • Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
  • Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
  • Gen 3 William Berry × Hannah Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
  • Gen 4 William Clarence Berry × Sally Bowles — Orange County, North Carolina

George Rufus Berry was born on February 29th 1829 in Orange County, North Carolina. George Rufus Berry was only about 6 years old when his mother died and his father decided to remove the family to Fayette County, Alabama where other Berry Family members were already settled. George’s sister Elizabeth Jane was only 4 years old and the baby, Roan Frances Berry was just 2.

item.title: Harrison Berry Iowa
item.description:
Harrison Berry (1854–1934)

Son of Lewis and Elizabeth Haywood Berry, Benton County, Iowa, to Pueblo, Colorado.

Harrison Berry, Son Of Lewis And Elizabeth Haywood Berry#

Ancestors#

  1. Generation Robert and Mary Williamson Berry: Princess Anne County, Virginia.
  2. Generation Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry: Orange County, North Carolina.
  3. Generation Joshua and Nancy Ellison Berry: Orange County, North Carolina.
  4. Generation Joshua Berry Jr. and Anna Thorpe Berry: Ohio
  5. Generation Lewis and Elizabeth Haywood Berry: Indiana and Kansas

Harrison Berry was born 31 May 1854 in Benton County, Iowa to Lewis and Eliza (Hayward) Berry. He was named after his uncle Harrison Berry, the son of Joshua and Anna (Thorpe) Berry, the brother of his father Lewis. He was the second child born to Lewis and Eliza, who were united in marriage on 18 March 1851 in Boone County, Indiana. Lewis and Eliza, along with Lewis’s parents Joshua and Anna (Thorpe) Berry and Eliza’s father [Abijah Hayward] had moved from Indiana to Iowa prior to the birth of Harrison. They all engaged in farming in the Benton and Linn County, Iowa area.

item.title: Isaac A. Cates Ga
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Isaac A. Cates Ga
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3David J. Berry × Mary Blalock — Orange County, NC → Georgia
Gen 4William Abraham Cates × Sarah Berry — Clayton County, Georgia
Gen 5Isaac A. Cates × Serena Crow — Henry County → Clayton County, Georgia

Generation 5 Isaac A. Cates

Born
December 27, 1823, Henry County, Georgia
Died
February 8, 1891, Ellenwood, Clayton County, Georgia
Married
Serena Crow (married October 10, 1844, Clayton County, GA; born March 20, 1828; died July 27, 1902)
Parents
William Abraham and Sarah Berry Cates
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of Isaac A. Cates#

Isaac A. Cates was born Dec. 27, 1823 in Henry County, Georgia. He married Oct. 10, 1844 in Clayton County, Georgia Serena Crow. He died Feb 8, 1891 in Ellenwood, Clayton County, Georgia. Serena was born Mar 20, 1828 in Henry County and died July 27, 1902 in Clayton County, Georgia.

item.title: James P. Berry NC
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. James P. Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3William Berry × Hannah Cate — Orange County, NC
Gen 4Thomas Person Berry × Sarah Lunsford — Orange County, NC
Gen 5James P. Berry × Artillia Wedding — Orange County, NC

Generation 5 James P. Berry

Born
1845, Orange County, North Carolina
Died
February 15, 1912, Orange County, North Carolina
Married
Artillia Wedding (married September 11, 1871)
Parents
Thomas Person Berry and Sarah Lunsford, Orange County, NC
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of James P. Berry#

James P. Berry was born in 1845 in Orange County, North Carolina. On September 11 1871 James P. Berry married Artillia Wedding who was born about 1851. Artillia is the daughter of Joseph and Louisa Burton Wedding. In the 1850 Census Joseph Wedding listed house # 1736 and

James P. Berry age 8 was living with his father in the house listing # 1747. James and Artillia Berry had six children. Two of them died young.

item.title: James Thomas Wilson NC
item.description:
James Thomas Wilson (1857–1929)

Father-in-law of Pattie Swiney Berry, Orange County, North Carolina.

James Thomas Wilson, father-in-law of Pattie Swiney Berry#

JAMES THOMAS WILSON was born in January 1857 in North Carolina. He died in 1929 and is buried at Little River Presbyterian Church Cemetery, Little River Township, Orange County, NC.

item.title: Jesse Lee Berry
item.description:
Jesse Lee Berry, son of Robert and Elizabeth Everett Berry#

  • Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
  • Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
  • Gen 3 David J. Berry × Mary Blalock — Orange County, NC → Georgia
  • Gen 4 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Everett — North Carolina & Georgia

JESSE LEE BERRY was born on December 2, 1852 in Roswell, Cobb County Georgia. Jesse Lee married Nancy Ann Henry who was born December 30 1857 in Ellenwood, Clayton Co., Georgia. They were married December 16 1874 in Clayton County Georgia. Nancy was the daughter of Edward Zachary “Zack” Henry and Mary Ann Mitchell. Zack’s Father was Jesse G. Henry and Nancy Hammock. Mary Ann’s father was Thomas Mitchell, son of Hinchey Mitchell and Elizabeth Ruff (daughter of William Ruff and Rebecca). In the picture of Jesse Lee on the right there seems to be a faded date of July 1875 written on the picture. He would have been 22 Yrs 7 Months old.

item.title: John Allmon Berry Ga

Died
Unknown
Married
Sarah Elizabeth (Sally) Stark
Parents
Robert and Elizabeth Everitt Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of John Allmon Berry#

John Allmon Berry born July 16th, 1843 in Fayette County, Georgia. He married Sarah Elizabeth (Sally) Starke. They had seven children.

item.title: Joshua Jr. Census
item.description:
Joshua Berry Jr. — Census Records

Census Listings from Ohio, Indiana, and Iowa, 1830–1880

Ancestors:

  1. Generation Robert and Mary Williamson Berry: Princess Anne County, Virginia
  2. Generation Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry: Orange County, North Carolina.
  3. Generation Joshua Jr. and Anna Thorpe Berry: NC, Ohio, Benton Co. Iowa.

Transcribed Joshua Berry Jr. 1830 Gallia County, Ohio census. James Thorpe in this census is most likely Annah Thorp’s sister.

item.title: Lewis Berry Ohio
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Lewis Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Joshua Berry Sr. × Nancy Ellison — Orange County, NC → Ohio
Gen 4Joshua Berry Jr. × Anna Thorpe — Gallia County, Ohio
Gen 5Lewis Berry × Eliza Haywood — Ohio → Iowa → Wichita, Kansas

Generation 5 Lewis Berry

Born
April 27, 1826, Gallia County, Ohio
Died
March 6, 1907, Wichita, Kansas
Married
Eliza Haywood (married March 20, 1851)
Parents
Joshua Berry Jr. and Anna Thorpe Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

LEWIS BERRY was born on April 27th, 1826 in Gallia Ohio. Lewis Berry married Eliza Haywood who was also born in Preble County Ohio on November 16, 1833. Lewis and Eliza were married on March 20th, 1851, Squire Bowen of Thorton, Indiana officiated. Elizabeth Haywood was the daughter of Abijah and Naomi Haywood of Essex County, N.J. Elizabeth’s mother died in 1851 and her father Abijah was living with Lewis and Elizabeth in their 1860 and 1870 census listing.

item.title: Martha M. Lockley
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Martha Minerva Berry Lockley

Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina

Gen 5Martha Minerva Berry × Lockley — Alabama and Texas

Generation 5 Martha Minerva Berry Lockley

Born
April 29, 1851, Fayette County, Alabama
Died
July 3, 1922, San Saba County, Texas
Married
Lockley
Parents
William Clarence Berry and Massa Ann Tompkins, Fayette County, AL
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Martha Minerva Berry Lockley#

Martha Minerva Berry was born on the 29th April 1851 in Fayette County, Alabama, and died in San Saba County, Texas, on July 3rd 1922. No information has been found that will tell exactly when Martha M. Berry went to Texas. She was 19 years old when her father

item.title: Mary Jane Berry, Daughter of WC & Massa Tompkins Berry
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Mary Jane Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3William Berry × Hannah Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 4William Clarence Berry × Massa Ann Tompkins — Fayette County, AL & Burnet County, TX
Gen 5Mary Jane Berry × Enoch Jefferson Kizzire — Fayette County, Alabama

Generation 5 Mary Jane Berry

Born
May 28, 1840, Fayette County, Alabama
Died
November 27, 1907, Fayette County, Alabama
Married
Enoch Jefferson Kizzire (married c. 1860, Alabama)
Parents
William Clarence Berry and Massa Ann Tompkins, Fayette County, AL
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Mary Jane Berry#

MARY JANE BERRY was born on 28 May 1840 in Fayette, Fayette, Alabama, USA. She died on 27 Nov 1907 in Fayette, Fayette, Alabama, USA. She married Enoch Jefferson Kizzire, son of Robert Lee Kiziah and Unknown Boyd, about 1860 in probably Alabama. He was born on 18 Mar 1836 in Alabama, USA. He died on 11 Jul 1933 in Fayette, Fayette, Alabama, USA

item.title: Mary Jori Berry Ga
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Mary Jori Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3David J. Berry × Mary Blalock — Orange County, NC → Georgia
Gen 4Robert Berry × Elizabeth Everitt Berry — Georgia

Generation 5 Mary Jori Berry

Born
June 11, 1836 (Bible page states 1835)
Died
July 4, 1890, Fayette County, Georgia
Married
Nathan Turley — born August 25, 1838, died December 26, 1923
Parents
Robert Berry and Elizabeth Everitt Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Mary J Berry grew up in the Roswell Georgia area of Milton County Georgia. In 1930 Milton County Georgia was renamed Fulton County Georgia. Mary J. Berry married Nathan Turley born August 25, 1838 and died December 26, 1923. The picture on the right is of Nathan Turley. There are no pictures known to exist of Mary J. Berry. Click on the picture to view a larger image. Nathan and Mary J Berry Turley had four Children

item.title: Mary Polly Cates Georgia
item.description:
Parents: William Abraham Cates and Sarah Berry

Mary Polly Cates was born 10th January 1822 in South Carolina as her parents made their way to Georgia. She marries James Alexander Walton in 1848 shortly after his first wife died.

item.title: Robert Riley Berry Ga
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Robert Riley Berry Ga
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3David J. Berry × Mary Blalock — Orange County, NC → Georgia
Gen 4Robert Berry × Elizabeth Everitt — Milton County, Georgia
Gen 5Robert Riley Berry × Martha Stark — Milton County, GA → Cullman County, AL

Generation 5 Robert Riley Berry

Born
June 10, 1840, Fayette County, Georgia
Died
March 31, 1909, Vinemont, Cullman County, Alabama
Married
Martha 'Mattie' Stark
Parents
Robert and Elizabeth Everitt Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

The Story of Robert Riley Berry#

Robert Riley Berry was born June 10, 1840 in Fayette County, Georgia. View Robert’s birthday entry in the family bible page. Robert Riley Berry grew up in the Roswell, Georgia area of Milton County, Georgia. In 1930 Milton County, Georgia was renamed Fulton County, Georgia. Robert Riley and two of his brothers married three sisters. The young ladies were the daughters of Jonas and Averella Kent Stark. Robert Riley married Martha “Mattie” Stark. The picture on the left is of Robert Riley and Mattie Stark Berry. Click on the picture to view a larger image. The other two brothers were William H. Berry who married Matilda Stark and John Allmon Berry who married Sarah “Sally” Stark. Robert died on March 31, 1909 in Vinemont, Cullman County, Alabama, USA[efn_note]Find A Grave profile for Robert Riley Berry[/efn_note].

item.title: Robert T Berry
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Robert T Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina

Born
c. 1849, Coosa County, Alabama
Married
Dorothy Ann Robinson
Parents

Explore in the Berry Family Timeline
  • Robert T Berry has a descendant who matches My William Berry YDNA by 66 of 77 markers At the present time we do not know who his father was but here is what we do Know
  1. Robert Berry and Mary Williamson Princess Ann County Virginia
  2. Robert Berry and Elizabeth Cate Orange County NC
  3. Berry Unknown

What we know

item.title: Roseann Frances Berry
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Roseann Frances Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3William Berry × Hannah Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 4William Clarence Berry × Sally Bowles — Orange County, NC → Fayette County, AL
Gen 5Roseann Frances Berry × Riley Kissiah — Fayette County, AL → Burnet County, TX

Generation 5 Roseann Frances Berry

Born
1833, Orange County, North Carolina
Died
August 11, 1922, McCulloch County, Texas
Married
Riley Kissiah (married December 23, 1860; killed in Civil War)
Parents
William Clarence Berry and Sally Bowles Berry, Orange County, NC
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Roseann Frances Berry is the daughter of William Clarence and Sally Bowles Berry#

Roseann Frances Berry was born in 1833 in Orange County North Carolina. She is the daughter of William Clarence Berry and Sally Bowles Berry. Sally Bowles Berry died when Roann was born or shortly afterwards. William Clarence Berry and his brother, Thomas Person Berry, sold their jointly owned property on September 19th 1833. It is my belief that William, Thomas and their other brother, Robert C. Berry, had decided to go to Fayette County Alabama where their Uncle Robert Berry Jr and his family settled in 1824. Their half sister, Elizabeth Berry Franklin and her husband Theodrick Franklin decided to go to Alabama with Elizabeth’s three brothers. When the trip to Alabama occurred in 1834 all of the children were very young. Roann was a year old, George Rufus was 5, and Elizabeth Jane was 3. Theodric and Elizabeth Franklin’s daughter, Temperance Jane Franklin, was 2. I am not certain if Thomas Person Berry and his new wife Sarah Lunsford Berry went with this wagon train. The thing that makes me think this may have happened is the long period of time when Thomas and Sarah were married and when their first child was born. Thomas and Sarah were married 28th of September 1831 and their first son was born 5 years later in 1836. Theodrick and Elizabeth Franklin had a son, Henry Berry Franklin, born in Alabama in 1835. Hannah Cate Berry may also have gone to Alabama with her children and grandchildren. If this is what happened then Thomas Person Berry, his wife, Sarah Lunsford Berry, and his mother, Hannah Cate Berry, returned to North Carolina before 1836.

item.title: Sarah Berry (TX)
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Sarah Berry (TX)
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Robert Berry Jr. × Mary Waggoner — Orange County, NC → Fayette County, AL
Gen 4George Berry × Susan Berry — NC → Fayette County, AL
Gen 5John Berry × Mary Howell — NC, AL → Rusk County, TX
Gen 6Sarah Berry × Hiram Howard / Francis McClure / Robert Taylor / Henry Stoneham / Henrick Dippold — Alabama → Rusk County, TX → Galveston, TX

Generation 6 Sarah Berry

Born
April 20, 1839, Alabama
Died
June 5, 1917, Galveston, Texas
Married
1st: Hiram Howard (m. 1853) — 2nd: Francis M. McClure (m. 1859) — 3rd: Robert A. Taylor (m. 1863) — 4th: Henry B. Stoneham (m. 1868) — 5th: Henrick Dippold (m. 1880)
Parents
John Berry and Mary Howell Berry
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

She was born on April 20, 1839 in Alabama and died in Galveston Texas on June 5th 1917. We were able to find Sarah Berry Dippold’s grave in 2006 while I was staying in Houston for medical reasons. The grave is located in the Trinity Episcopal Church Cemetery which is located in Galveston Texas. She is buried in Block # 100 plot 18 of that Cemetery. I was unable to locate her husband but he may still be buried there. This Cemetery has been raised several times, as it keeps sinking they haul in more dirt. Each family is responsible to see that their relatives headstones are raised to the new level. If the family does not assume that responsibility the grave is covered with dirt and is no longer visible. The sinking of the Island is caused by removal of oil from the surface below. Sarah was married five times. This was during the period of the civil war and may be the reason so many of them died. She married her first husband Hiram Howard on November 24th 1853. Sarah married her second husband, Francis M. McClure on January 5th 1859. On May 18th 1863 Sarah married her third husband Robert A. Taylor. Sarah married her fourth husband, Henry B. Stoneham on August 29 1868. She married her fifth husband Henrick Dippold on February 15th 1880.

item.title: Susan Berry Ala and Tx
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Susan Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3Robert Berry Jr. × Mary Waggoner — NC → Fayette County, Alabama
Gen 4George Berry × Susan Berry — Fayette County, Alabama
Gen 5Susan Berry × Moses Ray — Alabama → Mississippi → Arkansas → Texas

Generation 5 Susan Berry

Born
1834, Alabama
Died
After 1880, Gregg County, Texas
Married
Moses Ray (married c. January 1849)
Parents
George Berry and Susan Berry, Fayette County, Alabama
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

SUSAN BERRY was born in 1834 in Alabama. Susan Berry was probably 15 years old when she married Moses Ray. They were most likely married in January 1849. Their first daughter Sarah E Ray was born in November 1849. Sarah E. Ray was listed as eleven months old in October 1850. Susan and Moses had six children. Susan died after 1880 in Gregg Texas.

item.title: Winifred Berry Ga
item.description:
1. Home
  2. Ancestors
  3. Family Lines
  4. Winifred Berry
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina
Gen 3David J. Berry × Mary Blalock — Orange County, NC → Georgia
Gen 4Winifred Berry × Joshua Norman — Orange County, NC → Henry County, Georgia

Generation 4 Winifred Berry

Born
North Carolina
Married
Joshua Norman (married September 19, 1820, Orange County, NC; died November 13, 1832, Henry County, GA)
Parents
David J. Berry and Mary Blalock
Explore in the Berry Family Timeline

Winifred Berry is the daughter of David J. Berry and Mary Blalock. She married Joshua Norman in Orange County, North Carolina on September 19 1820. Joshua was born in North Carolina in 1790 and died. Joshua Norman died on November 13 1832 in Henry County Georgia. Joshua Norman was a very young man when he died and the couple only had two children as far as we know at the time of this writing. Joshua Norman and his family probably went to Georgia sometime around 1828 when David J. Berry and the rest of his family did. David J. Berry and Joshua Norman Listed in 1830 Georgia census. Winifred Norman was living with her son, David Norman in the 1850 and 1860 Georgia Census’ Source Citation: Year: 1850; Census Place: District 29, Fayette, Georgia; Roll: M432_69; Page: 42; Image: 88. Source Citation: Year: 1860; Census Place: Northen District, Clayton, Georgia; Roll: M653_117; Page: 102; Image: 103.
